title: polygonum lapathifolium subsp. pallidum
intro: Polygonum lapathifolium subsp. pallidum, also known as pale persicaria or pale lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant in the buckwheat family, Polygonaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Polygonum lapathifolium subsp. pallidum include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
